title: Classes: your own kind of object
body: A *class* is a blueprint for making your own kind of object that bundles data together with the actions on it. `class Counter:` defines the blueprint; `Counter()` makes one. Inside, `__init__(self)` sets up its starting data, and methods like `self.increment()` act on it. `self` just means 'this particular object'. The data-structures tier builds several of these — this is the warm-up.
